hyperedges.label: Credit Guard Flow: Auth + Credits + IP Throttle protecting Script Generation API
Video Upload Pipeline: Presigned URL + FFmpeg Compression + Supabase Storage

nodes.label: Project Roadmap: AI Video Script Editor
nodes.norm_label: project roadmap: ai video script editor

nodes.label: Credit Decrement Race Condition
nodes.rationale: Non-atomic SELECT+UPDATE pattern allows concurrent requests to each read credits=1 and both decrement, granting two generations for the price of one. Fix requires a Postgres RPC or conditional UPDATE with .gte() guard.

nodes.label: Presigned Upload URL Pattern
nodes.rationale: Vercel serverless function payload limit of 4.5MB means the frontend must NOT send video through a Next.js API route. Instead a presigned URL is fetched and the client uploads directly to Supabase Storage.

nodes.label: IP Hash Salt Security Vulnerability
nodes.rationale: IP_HASH_SALT falls back to 'default-salt' if env var missing, making IP anonymization ineffective and vulnerable to precomputation attacks.

nodes.label: In-Memory Throttle Store Limitation (Serverless)
nodes.rationale: ipThrottleStore is an in-memory Map that resets on every Vercel cold start, meaning throttle is not consistently applied across different serverless invocations.
